EuroSys 2008: Glasgow, Scotland, UK

Scheduling

  • Andreas Merkel, Frank Bellosa: Task activity vectors: a new metric for temperature-aware scheduling. 1-12
  • Baris Kasikci, Thomas Ball: Efficient scheduling under resource constraints. 13-26

Distributed Storage

  • Garth Gibson, Randy Katz: A case for redundant arrays of inexpensive disks. 27-40
  • Ion Stoica, David Andersen, Hari Balakrishnan: Chord: a scalable peer-to-peer lookup service for internet applications. 41-54

File Systems

  • John Ousterhout: Log-structured file systems revisited. 55-66
